scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run client:typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run validate:data && bun run validate:policy && bun run validate:quiz && bun run validate:quiz-policy && bun run validate:quiz-fixtures && bun run quiz:report:check && bun run prepare:public-quiz-data:check && bun run validate:dependencies && bun run validate:public-safety && bun run report:check && bun run site:check && bun run client:build && bun run validate:security-baseline && bun run validate:performance-baseline && bun run test:e2e
scripts.build: bun run prepare:public-quiz-data && bun run check && mkdir -p dist && cp -R reports dist/reports && cp README.md dist/index.md
scripts.report:check: bun run report && git diff --exit-code -- reports/quality-report.md
scripts.site:check: bun run site:build && test -f dist/site/index.html && test -f dist/site/quality-report.html && test -f dist/site/portfolio-readiness.html
scripts.validate:security-baseline: bun run site:build && bun run src/cli/check-security-baseline.ts
scripts.validate:performance-baseline: bun run site:build && bun run src/cli/check-performance-baseline.ts
scripts.quiz:report:check: bun run quiz:report && git diff --exit-code -- reports/quiz-quality-report.md
scripts.prepare:public-quiz-data:check: bun run prepare:public-quiz-data && git diff --exit-code -- public/study-it/quiz_data.json
scripts.client:build: bun run prepare:public-quiz-data && bunx --bun vite build
scripts.deploy:build: bun run prepare:public-quiz-data && bun run client:typecheck && bun run client:build
scripts.pages:verify: bun run typecheck && bun run client:typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run validate:data && bun run validate:policy && bun run validate:quiz && bun run validate:quiz-policy && bun run validate:quiz-fixtures && bun run quiz:report:check && bun run prepare:public-quiz-data:check && bun run validate:dependencies && bun run validate:public-safety && bun run report:check && bun run site:check && bun run validate:security-baseline && bun run validate:performance-baseline
scripts.pages:build: bun run pages:verify && bun run client:build
